design_philosophy.core_loop: Select rider and engine class, compete in motocross circuit races against AI opponents, optimize lap times and race positions
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Time pressure and positional competition against AI riders across multiple race circuits of increasing difficulty
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Competitive motocross racer progression through increasingly challenging circuits with different rider archetypes and engine power levels
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Structured progression through named circuits (Motocross → Radical → Nightmare → Doom → Forbidden) with discrete engine class tiers (50cc Kiddies through 250cc Pro) suggests intentional difficulty scaffolding; co-op support indicates design for shared competitive experience

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player selects engine class (50cc through 250cc) and rider before competition, allowing self-directed difficulty selection; circuit progression appears mandatory rather than open

progression.upgrade_system: Engine class selection (50cc Kiddies → 250cc Pro) affects bike performance; rider selection (Nails, Hawk, Fang documented) likely affects handling characteristics
progression.unlock_mechanism: Circuits unlock sequentially: Motocross Circuit → Radical Circuit → Nightmare Circuit → Doom Circuit → Forbidden Circuit; progression gates apparent from naming scheme
replayability_hooks: Multiple rider characters with distinct performance profiles
Time attack optimization (speedrun community active with leaderboards)
Co-op racing variant for all circuits
Five distinct circuits with varying track designs

world_building_techniques: Circuit naming progression (Motocross → Radical → Nightmare → Doom → Forbidden) implies escalating danger/difficulty atmosphere
Rider character naming and selection system suggests identity customization without explicit narrative

faction_indicators: Rider selection (Nails, Hawk, Fang) appears to create player identity
Engine class choice (50cc Kiddies vs 250cc Pro) signals competitive tier
danger_signals: Circuit naming escalation (Nightmare, Doom, Forbidden) creates implicit difficulty hierarchy
250cc Pro class represents highest competitive tier
environmental_storytelling: Circuit names evoke specific moods: Motocross (foundational), Radical (experimental), Nightmare/Doom/Forbidden (dangerous/extreme)
